description: Complete as many tasks as possible without being noticed.
descriptionfull: Complete as many tasks as possible without being noticed.
already_01: You are already in the room
already_02: Would you like to go there?
create duration: How many hours will the game be in play?
invite link: To invite players, use this link
room well: Well done! No more new tasks.
room no completed: You haven't yet completed any tasks.
room host message: Since you are the host, only you can end the game early (if needed).
room sure: Are you sure that you want to finish the game? This will show the results.
wrong text_01: Sorry. Looks like you're trying to enter the room that doesn't exist. Or you didn't yet join it.
wrong text_02: Please create the room or join in order to play.
about welcome: Welcome to Party Spies! Your task is to complete secret missions without being noticed. The winner is the one who completes the most tasks while staying under the radar.
about how to 1 text: One player creates a room, sets the timer, and shares a link or QR code to invite the others.
about how to 2 text: Players click on the link or scan the QR code to join the room.
about how to 3 text: Each player gets 8 tasks but can only see 4 at a time. Tasks should only be completed with other players who are also playing — not with non-players. You can still get caught by a non-player if they say you're acting suspiciously. Click 'Completed! or 'Caught!' if you get noticed, and receive a new task.
about how to 4 text: The game ends when the timer runs out. The player who completes the most tasks wins.
about tips 1 text: If a task involves another player or their belongings, make sure it doesn't make anyone uncomfortable. Avoid physical contact without consent.
about tips 2 text: Skip tasks that make you uncomfortable without any explanation.
about tips 3 text: Avoid actions that could lead to injury or awkward situations.
about final: Party Spies is all about fun, so be creative but respect others!
